popularStory.headline: Cecily Sutton Wrote to Thomas Cromwell in 1537
popularStory.description: In Feb 1537, she wrote to Thomas Cromwell, complaining of the poverty in which she and her husband were forced to live.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecily Grey於1488年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比時，她的父親Sir Thomas Grey34歲，母親Lady Cecily Bonville28歲。她於大約1512年與Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1554年4月28日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecily Grey于1488年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Grey34岁，母亲Lady Cecily Bonville28岁。她于大约1512年与Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1554年4月28日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecily Grey was born in 1488, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Grey, was 34 and her mother, Lady Cecily Bonville, was 28. She married Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley about 1512. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 28 April 1554, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Cecily Grey est née en 1488, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Grey, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecily Bonville, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley environ 1512. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 avril 1554, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Cecily Grey 1488 in Groby, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Grey 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Cecily Bonville 28. Sie hat um 1512 Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. April 1554 im Alter von 66 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

Lei sposato Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley circa 1512. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1554, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily Greyが1488年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Greyは34歳，母Lady Cecily Bonvilleは28歳であった。約1512年にSir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1554年4月28日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecily Grey(이)가 1488년 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Grey(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Cecily Bonville(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1512년 Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1554년 4월 28일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecily Grey nasceu em 1488, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Grey, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecily Bonville, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley aproximadamente 1512. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de abril de 1554, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecily Grey родилась в 1488 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Grey было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecily Bonville, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sutton 3rd Baron of Dudley около 1512 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 28 апреля 1554 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.
